This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Input tags should parse inside select if there are no options first.
  assert_equals: expected "<button>button</button><input>" but got "<button>button</button>"
[FAIL] Input tags should parse inside select if nested in another tag
  assert_equals: expected "<div><input></div>" but got "<div></div>"
Harness: the test ran to completion.
